description_long: This is a male construction worker standing upright with arms extended horizontally. He is dressed in light blue denim overalls over a white short-sleeve t-shirt, and wears dark blue shoes. His face and arms are exposed, showing a natural skin tone, and his hair is dark and short, with a cap on his head. The overalls have visible straps and pockets, typical of workwear designed for durability and utility. The figure's build is average, and the clothing appears slightly loose, suitable for manual labor. No safety helmet, reflective vest, or tool belt is present, and the shoes resemble standard work shoes rather than reinforced boots.
description: A male construction worker in blue overalls, white t-shirt, and dark shoes, with a cap and no visible safety gear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the worker's face, chest, and the full front of the overalls with arms outstretched.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the overalls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, overalls' straps, and the back of the legs and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the right seam of the overalls.
